title: banisteria kuntzei
intro: Banisteria kuntzei, also known as the Cat's Claw vine or Uncaria tomentosa, is a climbing woody vine native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have shown anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Banisteria kuntzei include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. The plant is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and some modern preparations also involve standardized extracts or tinctures.
